title: pulicaria cylindrica
intro: Pulicaria cylindrica, also known as False Thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in Africa and the Middle East. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Pulicaria cylindrica has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, as well as its potential use as an anti-diabetic and anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Pulicaria cylindrica can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical ointments.
